name: fooddanilo
description: Sistema SaaS para Bares e Restaurantes - PDV, Mesas, Comandas, Cozinha, Delivery, Estoque, Financeiro e mais.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server start" "npm --prefix client run dev"
